title: OKX RTMD Config
description: Venue-specific configuration for the OKX RTMD gateway. Public market data can run with defaults only; secret refs remain optional for authenticated/private extensions.

demo_mode.description: Use OKX demo market-data endpoints. When true, the runtime derives default WebSocket URLs from the demo wspap.okx.com hosts.

api_base_url.description: Base HTTPS URL for OKX REST market-data requests.

ws_public_url.description: Optional override for the OKX public WebSocket endpoint. If omitted, the runtime derives the default from demo_mode.

ws_private_url.description: Optional override for the OKX private WebSocket endpoint. Included for parity with the shared OKX config, though the current RTMD adaptor uses the public WebSocket path.

secret_ref.description: Optional Pilot/Vault path for the OKX credential bundle. The runtime reads `apikey`, `secretkey`, and `passphrase` from this secret.
